non_sensitive.content: Patient visiting hours are from 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM daily. Only two visitors per patient allowed at a time.
Today's special is roasted chicken with mashed potatoes. Vegetarian option: spinach lasagna.
All staff must wear ID badges at all times. Smoking is prohibited on hospital grounds.

sensitive.notes: CONFIDENTIAL: Patient has a history of smoking. Family unaware of full prognosis.
